title: LegacyAI Source-Patch Binding Record
description: Records the relationship between a source artifact (baseline) and one or more patches or a patchset.

source_artifact_id.description: ID of the source artifact (baseline) being patched.

patch_ids.description: List of patch IDs (SHA-256) referenced by this binding.

patchset_id.description: Optional patchset ID this binding belongs to, e.g. y2038:fix-time_t-overflow.

output_artifact_id.description: Optional ID of the derived artifact produced after patching.

created_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the binding was created.
